mapper.select: select s.*, c.course_name, u.real_name as artist_name, t.term_name, cl.name as class_name from performance_schedule s left join repertoire_info c on s.course_id = c.id left join sys_user u on s.artist_id = u.id left join cultural_season t on s.term_id = t.id left join venue_info cl on s.class_id = cl.id where s.artist_id = #{artistId} order by s.id desc

select s.*, c.course_name, u.real_name as artist_name, t.term_name, cl.name as class_name from booking_record cs inner join performance_schedule s on cs.schedule_id = s.id left join repertoire_info c on s.course_id = c.id left join sys_user u on s.artist_id = u.id left join cultural_season t on s.term_id = t.id left join venue_info cl on s.class_id = cl.id where cs.member_id = #{memberId} order by s.id desc

select s.*, c.course_name, u.real_name as artist_name, t.term_name, cl.name as class_name from performance_schedule s left join repertoire_info c on s.course_id = c.id left join sys_user u on s.artist_id = u.id left join cultural_season t on s.term_id = t.id left join venue_info cl on s.class_id = cl.id where s.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: insert into performance_schedule (course_id, term_id, artist_id, class_id, classroom, week_day, start_section, end_section, max_member_count, selected_count, status) values (#{courseId}, #{termId}, #{artistId}, #{classId}, #{classroom}, #{weekDay}, #{startSection}, #{endSection}, #{maxStudentCount}, #{selectedCount}, #{status})
mapper.update: update performance_schedule set selected_count = selected_count + 1 where id = #{id}
